content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — user-visible toggle subtitle says "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" (App/SettingsView.swift:12), which may trigger review questions about shipping unfinished features.

Pierre: Guideline 2.2 bars beta/demo/unfinished builds, and reviewers sometimes flag UI labeling a feature as "Experimental" and "unstable" as work-in-progress. The store metadata is clean (description.txt, release_notes.txt), but this in-app string is shown directly to users in Settings. Consider rewording to something like "Optional feature — sorting may change" or removing the instability disclaimer before submission.
